body:
Replace scattered env var lookups with a single Pydantic Settings class. Validate all required vars at startup (fail-fast). Remove hardcoded defaults and paths.

**Scope:**
- Create `agents/config.py` with Pydantic `BaseSettings` class
- Move all env var reads to config (PG_*, AZURE_*, GEMINI_*, GRAPH_*, etc.)
- Add startup validation — app fails immediately if required vars missing
- Remove hardcoded paths (`/c/Users/ritub/` in parse_resumes.py)
- Replace module-level client instantiation with lazy-load pattern

**Files affected:** All agents, all scripts, all APIs
title: refactor: centralized config with Pydantic Settings + startup validation
